name: Meera Sethi
quote: The leg sleeve took a few sessions to position quickly, but the controls were straightforward once my therapist showed me. I now use the pump during my evening reading, and the swelling feels easier to manage.

name: Rajesh Nair
quote: My surgeon recommended a regular compression routine after the operation. The timer makes it easier to stay consistent without watching the clock.

name: Anita Verma
quote: The arm cuff feels supportive without making the routine complicated. I appreciate being able to complete the session at home on the schedule my clinician gave me.

name: Suresh Iyer
quote: The pump is not silent, especially in a quiet room, but the sound is steady and I got used to it. The pressure controls are clear, and my leg-care routine now feels more structured.

name: Farida Khan
quote: The full-leg garment looked intimidating at first, but the markings helped me learn the setup. Regular sessions fit comfortably into my morning routine.

name: Devendra Shah
quote: I use the device as one part of the diabetic-foot plan my doctor set out. The display is readable, and the cuff is simple to check before each session.

name: Karthik Rao
quote: The adjustable timer is useful on days when my therapist changes the session length. I can follow the plan without changing the rest of my routine.
context: Varicose veins and leg swelling, 4 months

name: Prakash Bedi
quote: The two cuff sizes helped us find a better fit for my father. We still check the settings each time, but the sequence itself is easy to follow.

name: Nandini Bose
quote: I wanted a routine I could manage at home after my lumpectomy. The arm sleeve needs careful positioning, but the session feels calm once it starts.
